title: TrueShields
description: Shield based fall-deflect, bounce movement, and momentum riding for Forge 1.20.1.
body:
### Features:
- Fall deflect with shield durability cost.
- Bounce and forward momentum based on fall strength.
- Sprint-only shield ride mode.
- Crouch to reduce bounce height.
- Configurable behavior for balance.
- Custom enchantments and advancements.

### How to deflect:
1. Hold a shield in main hand or offhand.
1. And you need to look down and use it.

### How to ride:
1. Start falling with shield ready.
1. Keep sprint pressed at impact.
1. Deflect at impact to get forward boost in look direction.
1. Stronger fall gives stronger bounce and speed.
1. Hold crouch to reduce bounce height.

### Why deflect may fail:
1. You did not use shield before impact.
1. Fall distance is below the minimum configured threshold.
1. Curse of Luck can randomly fail deflect or break shield.
1. Shield durability is too low and overflow damage can still hurt the player.
